name: Twinkle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients together and pour into a 13 x 9 inch pan or use a yellow cake mix.
3. Bake for 25-30 minutes until set.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely, then cut into squares.
5. Place one layer on a serving plate and spread with filling.
6. Top with the second layer and serve.
